title: Approach to the Urgent Preliminary Ruling Procedure Through the International Protection of Children
author: Herranz, Mónica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This paper analyses the preliminary ruling referred to the ECJ under the urgent procedure. The central topic of this study is the development of the ECJ case law in relation with the requesting of the referring Courts to examine the need to deal the preliminary ruling under the urgent procedure; in particular in relation with the interpretation of Brussels II bis Regulation as part of the Area of Freedom, Security and Justice.
